---
title: "Respondents detection"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(haven)
library(tidyverse)
library(skimr)
library(corrplot)
library(scales)
library(ggthemes)
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)


current_dir <- getwd()
source(file.path(current_dir,"src","R","utils.R"))
source(file.path(current_dir,"src","R","outliers_functions.R"))

library(yaml)
config <- yaml.load_file(file.path(current_dir, "config.yaml"))
data_dir <- config$paths$data_dir

years <- c(2016, 2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2023, 2025)

waves <- list()
for (year in years) {
  file_path <- file.path(data_dir, config$sheds_files[[as.character(year)]])
  wave_name <- as.character(year)
  waves[[wave_name]] <- read_clean_sheds(file_path)
}

all_ids <- waves %>%
  map_df(~ select(.x, id)) %>%
  pull(id) %>%
  unique()

cat("\nTotal unique IDs across all waves:", length(all_ids), "\n")

cat("\n=== Summary ===\n")
cat("Total respondents (all waves):", sum(map_int(waves, nrow)), "\n")
cat("Total unique IDs:", length(all_ids), "\n")
cat("Duplicate appearances:", sum(map_int(waves, nrow)) - length(all_ids), "\n")

id_counts <- waves %>%
  map_df(~ select(.x, id), .id = "wave") %>%
  count(id) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

cat("\nDistribution of appearances:\n")
print(table(id_counts$n))
```

Data filtering config:
```{r}
# Duration filtering (in minutes)
MIN_DURATION <- 0
MAX_DURATION <- 100

# Apply filters to all waves
waves_filtered <- map(waves, function(data) {
  data %>%
    filter(
      !is.na(q_totalduration),
      q_totalduration >= MIN_DURATION,
      q_totalduration <= MAX_DURATION
    )
})
# Print filtering summary
cat("\n=== Filtering Summary ===\n")
cat("Duration range:", MIN_DURATION, "to", MAX_DURATION, "minutes\n\n")

filtering_summary <- data.frame(
  Wave = names(waves),
  Original = map_int(waves, nrow),
  Filtered = map_int(waves_filtered, nrow)
) %>%
  mutate(
    Removed = Original - Filtered,
    Pct_Kept = round(100 * Filtered / Original, 1)
  )

print(filtering_summary)
```

Run outlier detection:
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(corrplot)
library(patchwork)

wave_summary <- data.frame(
  Wave = character(),
  Total_Respondents = integer(),
  Median_Duration = numeric(),
  Below_10_min = integer(),
  Below_10_Pct = numeric(),
  Above_60_min = integer(),
  Above_60_Pct = numeric(),
  Outside_10_60_min = integer(),
  Outside_10_60_Pct = numeric(),
  Stability = integer(),
  Got_Questions = integer(),
  Straightliners = integer(),
  Straightliners_Pct_Total = numeric(),
  Straightliners_Pct_Got = numeric(),
  Inconsistent = integer(),
  High_Risk_Count = integer(),
  High_Risk_Pct = numeric(),
  Avg_Risk_Score = numeric(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

wave_results <- list()
plots <- list()

for (wave_name in names(waves_filtered)) {
  cat("WAVE:", wave_name, "\n")

  # Get original unfiltered data to count those outside 10-60 range
  data_original <- waves[[wave_name]]
  below_10 <- sum(data_original$q_totalduration < 10, na.rm = TRUE)
  above_60 <- sum(data_original$q_totalduration > 60, na.rm = TRUE)
  outside_range <- below_10 + above_60

  data_filtered <- waves_filtered[[wave_name]]
  total <- nrow(data_filtered)
  total_original <- nrow(data_original)

  # Calculate median duration
  median_duration <- median(data_filtered$q_totalduration, na.rm = TRUE)

  results <- run_outlier_detection(data_filtered)
    incons_detail <- results %>%
    filter(inconsistent == TRUE) %>%
    pull(inconsistency_types)

  if (length(incons_detail) > 0) {
    cat("\n--- Inconsistency type breakdown ---\n")

    # Split combined types (e.g. "age_mismatch; no_car_but_uses_car") into individual counts
    all_types <- unlist(strsplit(incons_detail, "; "))
    type_counts <- sort(table(all_types), decreasing = TRUE)

    for (i in seq_along(type_counts)) {
      cat(sprintf("  %-40s %d (%.1f%% of inconsistent)\n",
                  names(type_counts)[i],
                  type_counts[i],
                  100 * type_counts[i] / length(incons_detail)))
    }

    # How many had multiple types flagged
    n_multi <- sum(grepl(";", incons_detail))
    cat(sprintf("\n  Respondents with >1 inconsistency type: %d\n\n", n_multi))
  }


  wave_results[[wave_name]] <- results

  timing_speeders <- sum(results$timing_speeder, na.rm = TRUE)
  straightliners <- sum(results$straightline, na.rm = TRUE)
  inconsistent <- sum(results$inconsistent, na.rm = TRUE)
  high_risk_count <- sum(results$high_risk, na.rm = TRUE)
  avg_risk <- mean(results$risk_score, na.rm = TRUE)

  # Extract straightlining statistics
  straightline_stats <- attr(results, "straightline_summary_stats")
  n_got_questions <- if(!is.null(straightline_stats)) {
    straightline_stats$n_got_questions
  } else {
    NA
  }

  cat(sprintf("Total (original): %d\n", total_original))
  cat(sprintf("Total (filtered): %d\n", total))
  cat(sprintf("Below 10 min: %d (%.1f%%)\n", below_10, 100*below_10/total_original))
  cat(sprintf("Above 60 min: %d (%.1f%%)\n", above_60, 100*above_60/total_original))
  cat(sprintf("Outside 10-60 min range: %d (%.1f%%)\n", outside_range,
              100*outside_range/total_original))
  cat(sprintf("5th percentile: %d (%.1f%%)\n", timing_speeders, 100*timing_speeders/total))
  cat(sprintf("Straightliners: %d (%.1f%%)\n", straightliners, 100*straightliners/total))
  if(!is.na(n_got_questions)) {
    cat(sprintf("  • Got >2 questions: %d\n", n_got_questions))
    cat(sprintf("  • Straightliners as %% of those who got questions: %.1f%%\n",
                100*straightliners/n_got_questions))
  }
  cat(sprintf("Inconsistent: %d (%.1f%%)\n", inconsistent, 100*inconsistent/total))
  cat(sprintf("High-risk: %d (%.2f%%)\n\n", high_risk_count, 100*high_risk_count/total))

  # Plots distribution with the measures
  plots[[wave_name]] <- plot_completion_distribution(data_filtered, wave_name, show_plot = FALSE)

  wave_summary <- rbind(wave_summary, data.frame(
    Wave = wave_name,
    Total_Respondents = total,
    Median_Duration = median_duration,
    Below_10_min = below_10,
    Below_10_Pct = (below_10 / total_original) * 100,
    Above_60_min = above_60,
    Above_60_Pct = (above_60 / total_original) * 100,
    Outside_10_60_min = outside_range,
    Outside_10_60_Pct = (outside_range / total_original) * 100,
    Stability = timing_speeders,
    Got_Questions = ifelse(is.na(n_got_questions), total, n_got_questions),
    Straightliners = straightliners,
    Straightliners_Pct_Total = (straightliners / total) * 100,
    Straightliners_Pct_Got = ifelse(is.na(n_got_questions),
                                     (straightliners / total) * 100,
                                     (straightliners / n_got_questions) * 100),
    Inconsistent = inconsistent,
    High_Risk_Count = high_risk_count,
    High_Risk_Pct = (high_risk_count / total) * 100,
    Avg_Risk_Score = avg_risk
  ))
}

# Print summary table
cat("\n=== WAVE SUMMARY TABLE ===\n")
print(wave_summary)

# Create a formatted duration filtering table
cat("\n=== DURATION FILTERING SUMMARY ===\n")
duration_table <- wave_summary %>%
  select(Wave, Total_Respondents,
         Below_10_min, Below_10_Pct,
         Above_60_min, Above_60_Pct,
         Outside_10_60_min, Outside_10_60_Pct) %>%
  mutate(
    Below_10_Pct = sprintf("%.1f%%", Below_10_Pct),
    Above_60_Pct = sprintf("%.1f%%", Above_60_Pct),
    Outside_10_60_Pct = sprintf("%.1f%%", Outside_10_60_Pct)
  )

print(duration_table, row.names = FALSE)

# Create a formatted straightlining table
cat("\n=== STRAIGHTLINING SUMMARY ===\n")
straightlining_table <- wave_summary %>%
  select(Wave, Total_Respondents,
         Got_Questions, Straightliners,
         Straightliners_Pct_Total, Straightliners_Pct_Got) %>%
  mutate(
    Straightliners_Pct_Total = sprintf("%.1f%%", Straightliners_Pct_Total),
    Straightliners_Pct_Got = sprintf("%.1f%%", Straightliners_Pct_Got)
  )

print(straightlining_table, row.names = FALSE)

wrapped <- wrap_plots(plots, ncol = 2) & theme(plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))

#print(wrapped)
save_plot(wrapped, "plots_distribution")
generate_latex_row(wave_summary, "Total_Respondents", "All (N)")
generate_latex_row(wave_summary, "Median_Duration", "Median duration (minutes)", format_decimal = TRUE)
generate_latex_row(wave_summary, "Below_10_min", "Speeders (<10 min)", add_percentage = TRUE, pct_column = "Below_10_Pct")
generate_latex_row(wave_summary, "Above_60_min", "Slow completion time (>60 min)", add_percentage = TRUE, pct_column = "Above_60_Pct")
generate_latex_row(wave_summary, "Outside_10_60_min", "Response time outliers (<10 >60 min)", add_percentage = TRUE, pct_column = "Outside_10_60_Pct")
generate_latex_row(wave_summary, "Straightliners", "Straightliners (N)", add_percentage = TRUE, pct_column = "Straightliners_Pct_Got")
generate_latex_row(wave_summary, "Inconsistent", "Inconsistent (N)")
```

Investigate straightliners:
```{r}
straightliner_details <- analyze_all_straightliners(waves_filtered)

# To examine a specific wave in detail:
wave_2023_straightliners <- straightliner_details[["2023"]]
print(wave_2023_straightliners)
```

Plot ridges:
```{r}
library(ggridges)
plot_waves_ridges(waves_filtered)
```

Waves:
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

combined <- bind_rows(
  map(names(waves_filtered), function(wave) {
    waves_filtered[[wave]] %>%
      mutate(Wave = wave) %>%
      select(Wave, Duration = q_totalduration)
  })
)

pp <- ggplot(combined, aes(x = Wave, y = Duration, fill = Wave)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.8, outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(10, 60), linetype = "dotted", color = "gray50") +
  labs(
    x = "Wave", y = "Completion Time (minutes)"
  ) +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(combined$Duration, na.rm = TRUE) + 10, by = 5)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

print(pp)

save_plot(pp,"violin_plot_distribution")
```


Duration variables:
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(patchwork)
library(lubridate)

hms_to_minutes <- function(x) {
    parsed <- hms(x)
    ifelse(is.na(parsed), NA_real_, as.numeric(parsed) / 60)
}

comparison_waves <- names(waves_filtered) %>%
  keep(~ "duration_hms" %in% names(waves_filtered[[.x]]))

if (length(comparison_waves) == 0) {
  message("No waves contain duration_hms.")
} else {
  cat("Waves with duration_hms:", paste(comparison_waves, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")

  dur_cmp <- bind_rows(
    map(comparison_waves, function(wv) {
      waves_filtered[[wv]] %>%
        transmute(
          Wave          = wv,
          id,
          dur_qualtrics = q_totalduration,
          dur_hms       = hms_to_minutes(duration_hms)
        )
    })
  ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(dur_qualtrics), !is.na(dur_hms)) %>%
    mutate(diff_min = dur_hms - dur_qualtrics)


  dur_stats <- dur_cmp %>%
    group_by(Wave) %>%
    summarise(
      n            = n(),
      p5_qualt     = quantile(dur_qualtrics, 0.05),
      median_qualt = median(dur_qualtrics),
      p95_qualt    = quantile(dur_qualtrics, 0.95),
      max_qualt    = max(dur_qualtrics),
      p5_hms       = quantile(dur_hms, 0.05),
      median_hms   = median(dur_hms),
      p95_hms      = quantile(dur_hms, 0.95),
      max_hms      = max(dur_hms),
      median_diff  = median(diff_min),
      pct_gt1min   = 100 * mean(abs(diff_min) > 1),
      .groups      = "drop"
    )
  print(dur_stats)


  xmax_adaptive <- dur_cmp %>%
    summarise(across(c(dur_qualtrics, dur_hms),
                     ~ quantile(.x, 0.99, na.rm = TRUE))) %>%
    max()
  xmax_adaptive <- ceiling(xmax_adaptive / 10) * 10   # round up to nearest 10

  cat(sprintf("\nAdaptive xmax (99th pct): %.0f min\n", xmax_adaptive))


  dur_long <- dur_cmp %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = c(dur_qualtrics, dur_hms),
                 names_to  = "Source",
                 values_to = "Minutes") %>%
    mutate(Source = recode(Source,
                           dur_qualtrics = "q_totalduration",
                           dur_hms       = "duration_hms"))

```

Duration violin:
```{r}
dur_long <- bind_rows(
  map(comparison_waves, function(wv) {
    waves_filtered[[wv]] %>%
      transmute(
        Wave          = wv,
        id,
        dur_qualtrics = q_totalduration,
        dur_hms       = hms_to_minutes(duration_hms)
      )
  })
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dur_qualtrics), !is.na(dur_hms)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(dur_qualtrics, dur_hms),
               names_to  = "Source",
               values_to = "Minutes") %>%
  mutate(
    Source = recode(Source,
                    dur_qualtrics = "q_totalduration",
                    dur_hms       = "duration_hms"),
    Wave = factor(Wave)
  )

p_violin <- ggplot(dur_long, aes(x = Source, y = Minutes, fill = Source)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.6, trim = TRUE) +
  geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.9, outlier.size = 0.5, outlier.alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(10, 60), linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40", linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ Wave, nrow = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("q_totalduration" = "#4E9AF1",
                                "duration_hms"    = "#F1A34E")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, max(dur_long$Minutes, na.rm = TRUE) + 10, by = 10)) +
  labs(
    title    = "Completion time: q_totalduration vs duration_hms",
    subtitle = "Dotted lines at 10 & 60 min; boxes show median + IQR",
    x = NULL, y = "Completion time (minutes)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position   = "top",
    strip.text        = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.x       = element_text(size = 11),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

print(p_violin)
save_plot(p_violin, "duration_hms_violin")
```

diff durations:
```{r}
dur_diff <- bind_rows(
  map(comparison_waves, function(wv) {
    waves_filtered[[wv]] %>%
      transmute(
        Wave          = wv,
        id,
        dur_qualtrics = q_totalduration,
        dur_hms       = hms_to_minutes(duration_hms),
        diff_sec      = (hms_to_minutes(duration_hms) - q_totalduration) * 60
      )
  })
) %>%
  filter(!is.na(dur_qualtrics), !is.na(dur_hms))

cat("=== Difference summary (duration_hms − q_totalduration, in seconds) ===\n")
dur_diff %>%
  group_by(Wave) %>%
  summarise(
    n            = n(),
    min          = min(diff_sec),
    max          = max(diff_sec),
    median       = median(diff_sec),
    mean         = mean(diff_sec),
    pct_zero     = 100 * mean(diff_sec == 0),
    pct_within1s = 100 * mean(abs(diff_sec) <= 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  print()


p_diff <- ggplot(dur_diff, aes(x = diff_sec, fill = Wave)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, colour = "white", alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "solid",  colour = "black", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-5, 5), linetype = "dotted", colour = "grey40") +
  facet_wrap(~ Wave, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(-30, 30, by = 5),
                     limits = c(
                       max(-30, min(dur_diff$diff_sec) - 2),
                       min( 30, max(dur_diff$diff_sec) + 2)
                     )) +
  labs(
    title    = "Difference: duration_hms − q_totalduration (seconds)",
    subtitle = "A spike at 0 = identical; dotted lines at ±5 sec",
    x = "Difference (seconds)", y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "none",
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  )

print(p_diff)
save_plot(p_diff, "duration_diff_seconds")
```
